q2: Defined term: "Processing" means any operation performed on Personal Data... Usage: "Vendor will process Personal Data only on documented instructions..." (Section 4); the defined term "Processing" is not used consistently as a capitalized noun where the verb 'process' appears.
Section 1 uses lowercase 'personal data' while Section 2 defines 'Personal Data' and subsequent sections use capitalized form, demonstrating inconsistent use of the defined term.
Section 1 uses lowercase "personal data" while the defined term in Section 2 is capitalized "Personal Data".
